docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE SENT TO PLAINTIFF-RETURNED AS TO PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, LINH

DEPT. 506, JUDGE DON MITCHELL, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PRISCILLA BANH SET FOR MAR-24-2011 IS CONTINUED TO APR-07-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN 506. (NOTICE OF HEARING ON MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT SENT TO PLAITNIFF WAS RETURNED TO COURT ON MARCH 1, 2011).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, LINH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANH, PRISCILLA $1,112.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,172.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BANH, PRISCILLA HEARING SET FOR MAR-24-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PRISCILLA BANH IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO MAY-19-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. APPEARANCE BY MOVING PARTY ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
